{{Quote|I found him trying to steal a few pieces of azurite.|Gallou, on Stuart Zissou|<ref name="EEP4" />}}
'''Rennie Gallou''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] individual who served as a [[Quartermaster/Legends|supply officer]] in the [[Alliance Military/Legends|military arm]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shortly after the Alliance victory at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Gallou worked at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Outpost]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|317|Gallou, Rennie}}</ref> She once caught the young [[Stuart Zissu]], son of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trux Zissu]], after he stole a few pieces of [[azurite]] to [[Gambling/Legends|gamble]] with.<ref name="EEP4" />
